[[Freighter/Legends|Freighter]] '''''Morgath 1''''' was a [[Container transport]] used for backup convoy services by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] defector [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Harkov]]'s [[Victory I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]], the [[Protector (Victory I-class)|''Protector'']]. It was intercepted and shot down by [[Ace/Legends|Imperial Ace]] [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] along with ''[[Morgath 5]]'', [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] group ''[[Karflo]]'', group [[SoroSuub (CNVYR)|''SoroSuub'']], and [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] group ''[[Sundog]]''.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
